case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. PHILIP DEATON ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT DEATON, PHILIP DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT DEATON, PHILIP DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66489654), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC SERVED MAR-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEATON, PHILIP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEATON, PHILIP THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 670 EDDY STREET, ROOM 207, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66510757)
